title: Underground Dimension
description: Introduces a new underground dimension that players can explore.
body:
This datapack adds expansive underground dimension, where the surface is replaced entirely by a network of interconnected caves. This unique environment offers a fresh and challenging experience for players who love spelunking and exploring subterranean landscapes.
Use **/execute in honbar:underground run tp ~ ~ ~** to teleport to the dimension.
In conclusion this datapack is perfect for players looking to add a new layer of depth and excitement to their Minecraft adventures. Whether you’re a seasoned explorer or a newcomer to the game, the cave-only dimension offers endless opportunities for discovery and adventure.
